c74object.name: ambitap.decode~
c74object.digest: Decode a higher-order ambisonics bus to a loudspeaker layout
c74object.description: Decode a higher-order ambisonics bus to a loudspeaker layout. Creation args: . The layout fixes the output channel count; the output is one multichannel signal of speaker feeds.

attribute.name: max_re
attribute.digest: Apply per-order max-rE weighting to reduce side lobes
attribute.description: Apply per-order max-rE weighting to reduce side lobes.

attribute.name: decoder_type
attribute.digest: Decoder algorithm: mode_match (pseudoinverse), allrad (T-design + VBAP), or epad (energy-preserving)
attribute.description: Decoder algorithm: mode_match (pseudoinverse), allrad (T-design + VBAP), or epad (energy-preserving).
